ROW.conteudoViewDados: SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM

SELECT CLI_PK_59, CAST(COALESCE(RAZAO_SOCIAL_59, DESCR_59) AS CHAR(80)) AS RAZAO_SOCIAL_59, DESCR_59, CNPJ_CPF_59, INSCRESTADUAL, END_59, CIDAD_54, ESTAD_FK_54, BAIRRO_59, TEL1_59, TEL2_59, CEP_FK_59, BLOQ_CRED_59, PERCDESCSUFRAMA, DT_CADASTRO_59, CODENDENTREGA, CODIGOREGIONAL, CODIGOREGIAO, CONDICAOENTREGA, CODIGOCANALCLIENTE, CODIGOSUBCANAL, CODIGOCHECKOUT, CODIGOTABPRECO, DATAULTIMAVISITA, DATA_ULT_COMPRA, TIPO_ENTR_59, CODIGOCONDPAGTO, LJ_FK_59, TIPOFJ, OBSCLIENTE, CODIGOPEDIDOPERMITIDO, CODIGOVENDEDOR, VALORFRETE, CODIGOUNIDFATURAMENTO, ACRESJUROS, SUBSTRIBUTARIA, SUFRAMA, RETEM_ICMS_63, TEL3_59, DDD1_59, DDD2_59, DDD3_59, EMPRESA_LOG_FK_63, EMAIL_59, EMPRESA_PF_63, NUM_END_COMER_59, GRUPO_CLI_FK_59, MAX_CRED_59, TOTALTITULOSVENCIDOSCLIENTE, TOTALTITULOSAVENCERCLIENTE, COD_PRACA, COD_ROTA, DESCR_PRACA, DESCR_ROTA, DESCR_324, VLRCOMPRA90D, REF_ENTREGA, JANELAS_ENTREGA FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_CLIENTE WHERE CLI_PK_59 = :CODIGO
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM

SELECT MERC_PK_461, DESCRICAO, UNID_COMER_461, NCM_FK_461, REF_FABRIC, DEFIN_MERC_461, FOTO_461, FAMILIA_FK_461, CONTA_291, DESCR_291, EMPRESA_PF_468, PRC_COMER_468, SALDO, MERC_FUNCIO_468, FABRIC_PF_478, DESCR_271, GRUPO_FABRIC_FK_271, FAMILIA_COMIS_MERC_FK_468, DESCR_286, CUSTO_COMPRA_468, FATORSTPRODUTO, CLASSE_MERC_468, ENVIA_POCKET_461, LISTA_EMB_BLOQS FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_PRODUTO WHERE MERC_PK_461 = :PRODUTO AND EMPRESA_PF_468 = :FILIAL FOR READ ONLY
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM

SELECT NF_PK_680, SERIE_PK_680, TIPO_NF_PK_680, DT_LIST_PK_680, DT_GRAVA_680, TOT_LIQ_680, MODO_QUIT_680, STATUS, SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA, PESO_LIQ_680, CUBAGEM_680, OBSNOTA AS AVISO_NF_680, VLR_ST, CLI_FK_680, EMPRESA_PF_680, EMPRESA_LOG_FK_680, EMPRESA_DIGIT_FK_680, NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, NUM_PED_CONF_680, VEND_FK_680, CARREG_680, COD_RESTR_TRANSP, SN_BONIFICACAO, COD_PRACA, DESCR_PRACA, COD_ROTA, DESCR_ROTA, QTD_ITENS_PEDIDO, PRIORIDADE, '0' as COD_END_ALT_ERP, DT_LIST_PK_680 AS dtpreventrega FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680 = :NUMPED
SELECT MERC_PF_687, QTD_COMER_687, PRC_COMER_687, VLR_ST, CST_LIST_NF_57 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA_ITEM WHERE IDPLANILHA = BIGINT(SUBSTRING(:pedido, 1, INSTR(:pedido, '@') - 1))
SELECT ID_PK, VALOR_NEW FROM FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP WHERE SN_INT_REG='N' and CAMPO_ALT=:CAMPO_ALT order by ID_PK

select '9' AS STATUS, EMPRESA_DIGIT AS EMPRESA_DIGIT_FK_680, VALOR_NEW AS NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, 'N' AS SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA from FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP where VALOR_NEW=:VALOR_NEW AND CAMPO_ALT='CONTROL_CANCEL_680'
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT * FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE CODIGO = :CODIGO
SELECT * FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_MOTORISTA WHERE CODIGO = :CODIGO
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT 1 FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO WHERE 1=2 AND 1=:PARAM
SELECT COUNT(*) AS QTD FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA = 'S'
SELECT NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680 AS PEDIDO, 1 AS NUMPED, EMPRESA_PF_680 AS CODFILIAL FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA = 'S'
SELECT sum(PESO_LIQ_680) as PESO FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA = 'S'

INSERT INTO FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP (DATA_ALT, VALOR_NEW, CAMPO_ALT) SELECT CURRENT TIMESTAMP, IDCLIFOR, 'NEW_59' FROM DBA.CLIENTE_FORNECEDOR CF WHERE CF.TIPOCADASTRO IN ('C','A') AND CF.FLAGINATIVO = 'F' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DBA.NOTAS NOTAS JOIN DBA.NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA ON NOTAS.IDEMPRESA = NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA.IDEMPRESA AND NOTAS.IDPLANILHA = NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA.IDPLANILHA JOIN DBA.OPERACAO_INTERNA OPERACAO_INTERNA ON NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA.IDOPERACAO = OPERACAO_INTERNA.IDOPERACAO WHERE CF.IDCLIFOR = NOTAS.IDCLIFOR AND OPERACAO_INTERNA.TIPOMOVIMENTO = 'V' AND NOTAS_ENTRADA_SAIDA.DTMOVIMENTO >= DBA.SOMA_DIAS(CURRENT DATE, -120) )
INSERT INTO FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP (DATA_ALT, VALOR_NEW, CAMPO_ALT) select distinct CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CODIGO, 'NEW_762' FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_VEICULO
INSERT INTO FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP (DATA_ALT, VALOR_NEW, CAMPO_ALT) select distinct CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CODIGO, 'NEW_825' FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_MOTORISTA
INSERT INTO FUSIONT.FUSIONTRAK_INT_ERP (DATA_ALT, VALOR_NEW, CAMPO_ALT) select distinct CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CODIGO, 'NEW_825' FROM FUSIONT.VW_MOTORISTAS WHERE 1=2

INSERT INTO FUSIONT.fusiontrak_int_erp (empresa_fat, empresa_digit, empresa_log, pedido, nf, dt_list, data_alt, valor_new, campo_alt) SELECT EMPRESA_PF_680, EMPRESA_DIGIT_FK_680, EMPRESA_LOG_FK_680, NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, NF_PK_680, DT_LIST_PK_680, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, 'NEW_680' FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE SN_PODE_FORMAR_CARGA = 'S'

SELECT '0' AS COD_PRACA_ERP, UFENTREGA AS UF, DESCRCIDADE AS CIDADE, BAIRROENTREGA AS BAIRRO, ENDERECOENTREGA AS END, NUMERO AS NUM_END, CEPENTREGA AS CEP, '.' AS REF_ENTREGA, 'N' AS SN_PADRAO, 0 AS LATITUDE, 0 AS LONGITUDE, IDLOCALENTREGA AS COD_END_ERP, IDCLIFOR AS CLI_FK_680 FROM DBA.LOCAL_ENTREGA LOCAL_ENTREGA JOIN DBA.CIDADES_IBGE CIDADES_IBGE ON LOCAL_ENTREGA.IDCIDADE_ENTREGA = IDCIDADE WHERE IDCLIFOR = :PARAM AND IDLOCALENTREGA = :PARAM2

INSERT INTO FUSIONT.fusiontrak_int_erp (empresa_fat, empresa_digit, empresa_log, pedido, nf, dt_list, data_alt, valor_new, campo_alt) SELECT EMPRESA_PF_680, EMPRESA_DIGIT_FK_680, EMPRESA_LOG_FK_680, NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, NF_PK_680, DT_LIST_PK_680, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680, 'NEW_680' FROM FUSIONT.FUSION_VW_ENTREGA WHERE NUM_PEDIDO_ORIG_680 in (@)
